THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVERSTAR COACH LINES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONDORI, MARCELLA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
